description: Add JWT authentication with rate limiting

tasks.description: Create src/types/auth.ts with User, Session, JWTPayload interfaces and AuthConfig type
Implement JWT middleware in src/middleware/auth.ts - extract token, verify, attach user to Request
Add sliding-window rate limiting in src/middleware/rateLimit.ts, wire to /api/* routes
Write auth middleware tests: valid token, expired token 401, missing token 401, bad signature 403
Write rate limit tests: under-limit passes, at-limit 429, window reset, per-IP isolation
Update docs/api.md with authentication section, rate limit headers, error responses
